title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.15.5
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [rollup](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.14.6` -> `1.15.5`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/rollup/1.14.6/1.15.5) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.15.5`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1155)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.15.4...v1.15.5)

_2019-06-14_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Do not include any comments for completely tree-shaken files so that `renderedLength === 0` is a reliable check ([#​2940](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2940))
-   Do not cause type errors when returning `null` from `resolveId` ([#​2941](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2941))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2940](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2940): Completely omit files that do not have any included statements ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2941](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2941): Explicitly allow null as return value for various hooks ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.15.4`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1154)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.15.3...v1.15.4)

_2019-06-14_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Improve how asset and chunk URLs are resolved for UMD, IIFE and CJS output ([#​2937](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2937))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2937](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2937): Fix URL resolution to work when the current script contains query parameters ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.15.3`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1153)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.15.2...v1.15.3)

_2019-06-13_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Always reemit assets and chunks from cached transform hooks ([#​2936](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2936))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2936](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2936): Fix repeated re-emission of files emitted from a transform hook ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.15.2`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1152)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.15.1...v1.15.2)

_2019-06-13_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Make sure chunks emitted from transform hooks are also emitted for incremental builds in watch mode ([#​2933](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2933))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2933](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2933): Reemit chunks emitted from transform hooks ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.15.1`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1151)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.15.0...v1.15.1)

_2019-06-11_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Do not fail when reexporting variables in dynamic entry points from other chunks ([#​2928](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2928))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2928](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2928): Handle reexports from dynamic entries across chunk ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.15.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1150)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.14.6...v1.15.0)

_2019-06-11_

##### Features

-   Tone down try-catch deoptimization while maintaining polyfill support ([#​2918](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2918))

##### Bug Fixes

-   Handle feature detection with "typeof" for regular expressios ([#​2916](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2916))
-   Deoptimize `'' + variable'` type coercion as expression statement for feature detection ([#​2917](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2917))
-   Always observe argument side-effects when tree-shaking ([#​2924](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2924))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2916](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2916): Deoptimize typeof for regular expression literals to better support es6-shim ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2917](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2917): Support implicit type coercion errors in es5-shim ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2918](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2918): Deoptimize try-catch less radically ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2924](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2924): Do not tree-shake arguments with side-effects ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

</details>
